</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Focus on non-checkerboard objects
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Filter for objects that aren't the checkerboard pattern (B/c 16-pixel blocks)
important = []
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] not in ['B', 'c'] or n['pixels'] != 16:
        important.append(n)

print(f"Important objects ({len(important)}):")
for n in important:
    print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, hash={n['hash']}")
    print(f"    boundary={n['boundary']}")
    print(f"    children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
